ham.subject: Your subscription renewal reminder – Action required
ham.body:
Dear Priya,

We hope you are enjoying our services. Your subscription to XYZ SaaS is set to renew on 15th May 2026. Please review the renewal details and confirm the payment to avoid interruption.

• Plan: Pro Annual
• Amount: INR 12,000
• Renewal Date: 15th May 2026

To renew, simply click the button below:

[Renew Now] <URL>

If you have any questions, feel free to reply to this email or contact our support team.

Thank you for choosing XYZ SaaS!

Best regards,
XYZ SaaS Team

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required – Meeting Confirmation
spam.body:
Hi Amit,

This is a reminder from the HR department. We have scheduled a mandatory team meeting on 13th May 2026 at 10:00 AM (IST). Your presence is essential to discuss the upcoming project rollout.

Meeting Details:
• Platform: Zoom/Teams (Choose your preference)
• Time: 10:00 AM – 11:00 AM IST
• Link: <URL>

Please confirm your attendance by replying "YES" to this email. If you do not confirm, you may face a temporary suspension of your account access.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Regards,
HR Team
